description: Comprehensive Loki log aggregation deep-dive dashboard for operators managing multiple clusters and stacks. Covers write path, read path, storage, compaction, retention, resource utilization, and per-tenant analysis.

panels.description: SLO compliance for write (push) requests. Measures the percentage of push requests completing within the 0.5s threshold. Green >= 99%, Yellow >= 95%, Red < 90%.

targets.expr: sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~"loki_api_v1_push|/logproto.Pusher/Push", le="0.5"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~"loki_api_v1_push|/logproto.Pusher/Push", le="+Inf"}[$__rate_interval])) * 100

panels.title: Write QoS

panels.description: SLO compliance for query (read) requests. Measures the percentage of query requests completing within the 2.0s threshold. Green >= 99%, Yellow >= 95%, Red < 90%.

targets.expr: sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~".*query.*", le="2.0"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum(rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~".*query.*", le="+Inf"}[$__rate_interval])) * 100

panels.title: Query QoS

panels.description: Total log ingestion throughput in bytes per second across all distributors. Indicates the volume of log data being received by Loki.
panels.title: Ingestion Rate

panels.description: Current number of active log streams across all ingesters. Calculated as total created minus total removed streams.
panels.title: Active Streams

panels.description: Rate at which chunks are being stored by ingesters. Indicates the chunk creation throughput across the write path.
panels.title: Chunk Store Rate

panels.description: Number of distinct tenants actively writing log streams. Useful for capacity planning and tenant proliferation monitoring.
panels.title: Tenant Count

panels.description: Rate of bytes received by distributors, broken down by cluster. Shows the volume of incoming log data across the write path.
panels.title: Distributor — Bytes Received/s

panels.description: Rate of log lines received by distributors, broken down by cluster. Complements bytes received for understanding ingestion volume.
panels.title: Distributor — Lines Received/s

panels.description: Push request latency percentiles (P50, P90, P99) for the Loki push API. High latency indicates write path saturation or resource contention.
panels.title: Push Request Latency

panels.description: Rate at which ingesters are flushing chunks to long-term storage, broken down by cluster. A drop may indicate ingester issues.
panels.title: Ingester — Chunks Flushed/s

panels.description: Rate of discarded (failed) log samples by reason. Spikes indicate rate-limiting, validation errors, or tenant quota violations.
panels.title: Write Failures

panels.description: Rate of WAL (Write-Ahead Log) records written by ingesters. WAL provides durability guarantees for in-flight data before it is flushed to long-term storage.
panels.title: Ingester WAL Records/s

panels.description: Query frontend request rate broken down by HTTP status code. Useful for identifying error rates (4xx/5xx) and total query throughput.
panels.title: Query Frontend — QPS

panels.description: Query frontend latency percentiles (P50, P90, P99) for query routes. High latency indicates read path bottlenecks or large query scopes.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~".*query.*"}[$__rate_interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by (le) (rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~".*query.*"}[$__rate_interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~".*query.*"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Query Frontend — Latency

panels.description: Rate of queries processed by the query frontend, broken down by split_by dimension. Shows how queries are being split and sharded for parallel execution.
panels.title: Query Split & Sharding

panels.description: Rate of bytes decompressed from the chunk store by queriers. High values indicate large query scopes or inefficient query patterns.
panels.title: Querier — Chunks Decompressed/s

panels.description: Rate of index gateway (BoltDB shipper) queries per second. Tracks index lookup load on the read path.
panels.title: Index Gateway Queries/s

panels.description: Cache hit ratio as a percentage. Calculated as cache hits divided by total cache fetches. A low ratio indicates cache misses and potential performance degradation.
panels.title: Cache Hit Ratio

panels.description: Number of in-memory chunks held by ingesters, broken down by cluster. Indicates memory pressure on the ingester component.
panels.title: Chunk Store Size

panels.description: Rate of completed compactor runs. Compaction merges small index files and chunks for query performance and storage efficiency.
panels.title: Compactor — Compactions/s

panels.description: Rate of object store (S3/GCS/Azure) bucket operations broken down by operation type. Helps identify storage backend bottlenecks.
panels.title: Object Store Operations

panels.description: Rate of retention sweep runs by the compactor. Each sweep evaluates stored data against the configured retention policy and marks expired data for deletion.
panels.title: Retention Runs

panels.description: Rate of bytes deleted by the compactor during retention enforcement. Indicates how much expired log data is being reclaimed.
panels.title: Deleted Bytes

panels.description: CPU usage by Loki component container. Helps identify which components are CPU-bound and may need scaling or resource adjustments.
panels.title: CPU by Component

panels.description: Working set memory usage by Loki component container. Identifies memory-heavy components and potential OOM risks.
panels.title: Memory by Component

panels.description: Disk I/O operations per second (reads + writes) by Loki component container. High IOPS may indicate WAL pressure or compaction activity.
panels.title: Disk IOPS

panels.description: Network throughput (receive and transmit) for Loki pods. Helps identify network saturation or unexpected traffic patterns.
panels.title: Network Throughput

panels.description: Top 10 tenants ranked by log ingestion byte rate. Identifies the heaviest producers to guide capacity planning and cost allocation.
panels.title: Top 10 Tenants by Ingestion Rate

panels.description: Top 10 tenants ranked by query request rate. Identifies the heaviest query consumers to guide performance tuning and resource allocation.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (tenant) (rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_count{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~".*query.*"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Top 10 Tenants by Query Rate

title: Loki Deep Dive — Multi-Stack Operations
